articles.title: TACO: Tool-Augmented Credit Optimization for Agentic Tool Use
articles.excerpt: Agentic multimodal models perform diverse operations on an image via code and reason over the returned view, an effective paradigm for fine-grained visual question answering. articles.title: Learning Transferable Dynamics Priors from Action to World Modeling

articles.summary: 提出A2World多视角交互基础扩散世界模型，通过预训练学习动作驱动的视觉演化，捕获可迁移动力学先验，用于机器人学习超越外观级生成。

articles.title: Bridging VideoQA and Video-Guided Agentic Tasks via Generalized Keyframe Extraction
articles.excerpt: Video understanding is a fundamental capability for multimodal intelligence, and recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on Video Question Answering (VideoQA) benchmarks. articles.summary: 提出广义关键帧提取方法，桥接VideoQA与视频引导代理任务，使MLLM从浅层视觉感知迈向深层知识与程序技能学习。

articles.title: Agentic Abstention: Do Agents Know When to Stop Instead of Act?

articles.summary: 定义代理性弃权问题，探讨LLM代理在任务不可达时应主动停止工具调用而非继续行动，提升代理的鲁棒性与可靠性。
